question: Which of the following is NOT one of the seven aspects of project performance?
explanation: In PRINCE2 7, i sette aspetti della performance sono: Cost, Time, Quality, Scope, Benefits, Risk e Sustainability. 'Reliability' non è classificato come un aspetto di performance a sé stante.

question: Which statement about a project is CORRECT?
options: A. It is a permanent organization created to deliver business products
B. It is a temporary organization created to deliver one or more business products
C. It is a set of activities designed to manage business as usual
D. It is a method for managing long-term operational activities
explanation: La definizione di progetto in PRINCE2 è un'organizzazione temporanea creata allo scopo di consegnare uno o più prodotti di business secondo un Business Case concordato.

question: Which principle is being applied when a project team documents what went well and what went wrong during a stage boundary?
options: D. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Il principio 'Learn from experience' richiede che le lezioni vengano ricercate, registrate e applicate durante l'intera vita del progetto.

question: PRINCE2 principles are characterized by which of the following? 1. They are universal. 2. They are self-validating. 3. They are optional. 4. They are empowering.
explanation: I principi di PRINCE2 sono universali (applicabili a ogni progetto), auto-validanti (provati dalla pratica) e abilitanti (empowering), poiché danno fiducia al team. Non sono mai opzionali.

question: What is the primary focus of the 'People' element in PRINCE2 7?
options: A. Defining the number of resources needed for a project
B. Establishing the internal and external relationships within the project ecosystem
C. Creating the project's technical specifications
D. Managing the financial payroll of the project team
explanation: L'elemento 'People' si concentra sulla gestione delle relazioni, della cultura e della collaborazione all'interno dell'ecosistema del progetto.

question: Which is an aspect of leadership as described in the people element?
options: A. Dictating every step of the team's work without feedback
B. Motivating people and influencing culture
C. Ignoring organizational boundaries to speed up delivery
D. Focusing only on technical tasks rather than stakeholder engagement
explanation: La leadership riguarda la motivazione, l'influenza sulla cultura del progetto e la capacità di guidare le persone verso gli obiettivi comuni.

question: Which statement about the 'Business Case' practice is CORRECT?
options: A. It is only produced at the end of the project
B. It provides the justification for the project and is reviewed at each stage boundary
C. It is owned and maintained by the project manager alone
D. It is used to record the technical requirements of the project products
explanation: Il Business Case documenta la giustificazione del progetto e deve essere riconsiderato ai confini di stage (Stage Boundary) per confermare la fattibilità continua.

question: What is the main purpose of the 'Organizing' practice?
options: A. To define the sequence of project activities
B. To define and establish the project's structure of accountability and responsibilities
C. To organize the project's physical assets and equipment
D. To determine the project's financial budget
explanation: La pratica 'Organizing' serve a definire chi è responsabile di cosa, stabilendo i ruoli e le responsabilità all'interno del team di gestione.

question: Which role represents the interests of those who will use the project's products?
explanation: Il Senior User rappresenta gli stakeholder che utilizzeranno i prodotti per ottenere benefici o gestire operazioni quotidiane.

question: What is a 'Project Plan' used for?
options: A. To provide the baseline for progress control for the whole project
B. To provide the day-to-day detail of the team's tasks
C. To record the quality measurements of individual products
D. To act as a contract between the supplier and the user
explanation: Il Project Plan è il documento di alto livello che definisce i tempi, i costi e i prodotti per l'intero progetto, fungendo da baseline per il controllo.

question: Which of the following is a purpose of the 'Quality' practice?
options: A. To ensure that the project is delivered at the lowest possible cost
B. To define and implement the means by which the project will verify that products are fit for purpose
C. To ensure that no changes are made to the project scope
D. To manage the technical expertise of the team members
explanation: La pratica della Qualità assicura che i prodotti soddisfino le aspettative degli utenti e i criteri di accettazione definiti.

question: A threat to the project has been identified. Which risk response involves taking action to reduce the probability of the event occurring?
explanation: La risposta 'Reduce' (Riduzione) mira a diminuire la probabilità che una minaccia si verifichi o l'impatto che avrebbe se accadesse.

question: Which management product is used to record informal issues and notes by the project manager?
explanation: Il Daily Log viene usato dal PM per registrare note informali, problemi minori o azioni quotidiane che non richiedono una gestione formale immediata.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Progress' practice?
options: A. To speed up the delivery of the project products
B. To establish mechanisms to monitor and compare actual achievements against those planned
C. To ensure that the team is working overtime to meet deadlines
D. To document the technical progress of each individual task
explanation: La pratica del Progresso serve a monitorare se il progetto sta procedendo secondo i piani e a gestire eventuali scostamenti (tolleranze).

question: What is the first process in the PRINCE2 lifecycle?
explanation: Il processo 'Starting up a project' avviene nel pre-progetto per verificare se vale la pena avviare l'iniziazione formale.

question: Which process is used by the Project Board to authorize the initiation of a project?
explanation: Il Project Board utilizza 'Directing a project' per prendere decisioni chiave, inclusa l'autorizzazione dell'iniziazione.

question: What is an objective of the 'Closing a project' process?
options: A. To plan the next stage of the project
B. To verify user acceptance of the project's products
C. To authorize the start of the final stage
D. To manage the day-to-day tasks of the project team
explanation: L'obiettivo della chiusura è confermare che i prodotti siano stati accettati e che il progetto possa essere terminato in modo ordinato.

question: Which of the following describes 'Output'?
options: A. The result of the change derived from using the project's products
B. A specialist product that is handed over to the users
C. The measurable improvement resulting from an outcome
D. The total cost of the project investment
explanation: In PRINCE2, l'Output è il prodotto fisico o intangibile consegnato dal progetto (es: un nuovo sistema software).

question: Which principle states that a PRINCE2 project has defined and agreed roles and responsibilities?
options: B. Defined roles, responsibilities and relationships
D. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Questo principio assicura che tutte le parti interessate capiscano cosa ci si aspetta da loro e dagli altri.

question: Which role is responsible for the 'Benefits Management Approach'?
explanation: L'Executive è il responsabile ultimo del Business Case e, di conseguenza, dell'approccio alla gestione dei benefici.

question: Which is NOT a step in the PRINCE2 risk management procedure?
explanation: La procedura di rischio comprende: Identify, Assess, Plan, Implement e Communicate. 'Delegate' non è uno step della procedura standard.

question: When an exception occurs, which management product should be produced to inform the Project Board?
explanation: L'Exception Report viene usato dal PM per scalare al Board la notizia che una tolleranza è stata o sarà superata.

question: Which process covers the activities of the Team Manager?
explanation: Il processo 'Managing product delivery' è quello in cui il Team Manager accetta i pacchetti di lavoro e consegna i prodotti.

question: What is the purpose of 'Managing a stage boundary'?
options: A. To authorize the Project Plan
B. To provide the Project Board with sufficient information to review the current stage and approve the next one
C. To manage the day-to-day activities of the current stage
D. To handover the products to the users
explanation: Questo processo serve a preparare i piani e le informazioni necessarie affinché il Board decida se continuare con lo stage successivo.

question: Identify the missing word: The project [?] represents the business, user and supplier interests.
explanation: Il Project Board è l'organo decisionale che deve bilanciare gli interessi del Business (Executive), dell'Utente (Senior User) e del Fornitore (Senior Supplier).

question: What is 'Benefit' defined as?
options: A. A product delivered by the project
B. The result of a change derived from an outcome
C. The measurable improvement resulting from an outcome perceived as an advantage by a stakeholder
D. The cost savings achieved during the project initiation
explanation: Un beneficio è un miglioramento misurabile che deriva da un risultato del progetto e che viene percepito come un vantaggio.

question: Which principle is being applied when the Project Manager only informs the Project Board about project progress at predefined intervals, unless tolerances are breached?
options: C. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Il principio 'Manage by exception' riduce il carico di lavoro del Board, intervenendo solo se le tolleranze concordate sono a rischio.

question: In the context of the people element, what does 'Organizational Ecosystem' refer to?
options: A. The software tools used for project management
B. The wider environment in which the project operates, including the business and external stakeholders
C. The hierarchy of the project management team only
D. The physical location of the project office
explanation: L'ecosistema organizzativo comprende tutte le entità interne ed esterne che influenzano o sono influenzate dal progetto.

question: Which of the following are components of the Business Case? 1. Benefits. 2. Costs. 3. Technical specifications. 4. Risks.
explanation: Il Business Case si concentra sulla giustificazione economica (benefici, costi, rischi, tempi). Le specifiche tecniche appartengono invece alla descrizione dei prodotti.

question: Which management product defines how and when a project's products will be delivered?
explanation: I piani (Project, Stage, Team) sono gli strumenti che definiscono tempi, costi e scadenze di consegna.

question: What is the purpose of a 'Product Description'?
options: A. To describe the project's financial budget
B. To define the purpose, composition and quality criteria of a product
C. To list all the team members working on a product
D. To act as a summary of the project goals
explanation: La Product Description è fondamentale per il principio 'Focus on products' poiché chiarisce esattamente cosa deve essere creato.

question: Which is a type of 'Issue' in PRINCE2? 1. Request for change. 2. Off-specification. 3. Lesson. 4. Problem/Concern.
explanation: Le issue formali sono divise in: richieste di modifica, fuori specifica (off-spec) e problemi/preoccupazioni generali. Le lezioni sono registrate separatamente.

question: Who is responsible for producing the 'Highlight Report'?
explanation: Il PM produce l'Highlight Report per aggiornare il Board sull'andamento dello stage corrente.

question: In which process is the 'Project Brief' created?
explanation: Il Project Brief è l'output principale del processo 'Starting up a project' e fornisce la base per l'iniziazione.

question: What does 'Tailoring' involve in a PRINCE2 project?
options: A. Omitting processes that the Project Manager does not like
B. Adapting the method to suit the project context and environment
C. Changing the PRINCE2 principles to fit the project
D. Using only the parts of PRINCE2 that are required by law
explanation: Adattare (Tailoring) significa calibrare i processi e le pratiche per renderli efficaci in base alla scala e alla complessità del progetto.

question: Which is a characteristic of 'Business as Usual'?
options: A. It is temporary and unique
B. It is repetitive and ongoing
C. It involves high levels of uncertainty
D. It is managed through management stages
explanation: Il Business as Usual (operatività) è ripetitivo e continuo, a differenza dei progetti che sono temporanei e unici.

question: Which principle is being applied when a project is divided into at least two management stages?
options: D. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: PRINCE2 richiede almeno due stage: l'iniziazione e almeno uno stage di consegna.

question: What is the purpose of 'Co-creation' in project management?
options: A. To allow everyone to do whatever they want
B. To work collaboratively with stakeholders to create shared value
C. To increase the number of products delivered
D. To reduce the cost of project management
explanation: La co-creazione favorisce l'impegno e assicura che le soluzioni siano adatte alle reali necessità degli stakeholder.

question: Which management product contains the strategy for managing communications with stakeholders?
explanation: Il Communication Management Approach definisce chi deve ricevere quali informazioni e con quale frequenza.

question: A project manager has been given a 10% budget tolerance. Which principle is this supporting?
explanation: La tolleranza è lo strumento chiave del 'Manage by exception', delegando l'autorità senza richiedere continui permessi.

question: What is an 'Opportunity' in risk management?
options: A. A risk that has a negative impact on objectives
B. An uncertain event that could have a positive impact on objectives
C. A task that was completed ahead of schedule
D. A meeting with the Project Board
explanation: In PRINCE2, il rischio è incertezza e può essere sia una minaccia (negativo) che un'opportunità (positivo).

question: Which of the following is a purpose of the 'Progress' practice?
options: A. To ensure the Project Manager is working hard
B. To provide a mechanism for the Board to monitor project viability
C. To prevent any risks from occurring
D. To record the quality tests performed on products
explanation: La pratica del progresso permette al Board di esercitare il controllo e decidere se il progetto deve continuare.

question: Which process is responsible for assigning work to the team?
explanation: In 'Controlling a stage', il PM assegna i 'Work Packages' ai Team Manager.

question: In 'Initiating a project', which document is finalized to include all management approaches?
explanation: La PID è il 'contratto' di gestione che consolida tutte le strategie e i piani necessari per il progetto.

question: Which role provides independent monitoring of the project's progress and quality?
explanation: La Project Assurance verifica l'integrità del progetto in modo indipendente dal Project Manager.

question: Identify the missing word: The [?] Register records all planned and completed quality activities.
explanation: Il Quality Register è lo strumento per tracciare test, revisioni e approvazioni della qualità.

question: What is an 'Exception'?
options: A. A risk that has occurred
B. A situation where a tolerance is forecast to be exceeded
C. A project that was closed early
D. A new requirement from the user
explanation: L'eccezione si verifica quando il PM non può più garantire la consegna entro i limiti di tolleranza concordati.

question: Who should decide on a 'Request for Change' if it is beyond the Project Manager's authority?
explanation: Le modifiche che impattano le tolleranze o le baseline devono essere approvate dal Board o da un'autorità di cambiamento delegata.

question: Which process ensures that the Project Board is only involved when necessary?
explanation: Sebbene 'Manage by exception' sia un principio, il processo 'Directing a project' lo abilita definendo i punti di decisione.

question: Which activity is part of 'Closing a project'?
options: B. Handing over products and documentation
explanation: Il passaggio di consegne (Handover) è un'attività critica della chiusura per garantire la sostenibilità operativa.

question: What is the primary difference between a Project and Business as Usual?
options: B. Projects introduce change, BAU maintains the status quo
D. BAU has a defined end date
explanation: I progetti servono a cambiare le cose; l'operatività serve a far funzionare le cose esistenti.

question: Which principle is ignored if a project is started without a Business Case?
explanation: Senza una giustificazione commerciale valida, il progetto non dovrebbe esistere in PRINCE2.

question: What is 'Competency' refer to in the people element?
options: A. The number of hours a person works
B. The skills, knowledge and experience of people in the project
C. The hierarchy of the organizational chart
D. The cost of hiring a contractor
explanation: La competenza assicura che le persone assegnate ai ruoli abbiano le capacità necessarie per svolgere i compiti.

question: Which practice establishes the 'Lessons Log'?
explanation: Sebbene l'apprendimento sia un principio, la registrazione e il monitoraggio delle lezioni è supportato dalla pratica del progresso e della qualità.

question: What is a 'Tolerated Risk'?
options: A. A risk that has been eliminated
B. A risk that has been accepted because its impact is within limits
C. A risk that the project manager forgot to record
D. A risk that has been transferred to an insurance company
explanation: Accettare un rischio significa decidere di non agire preventivamente, monitorandolo però per assicurarsi che resti entro limiti accettabili.

question: Which of the following describes the 'Executive' role?
options: A. The person who writes the software
B. The person who owns the Business Case and ensures the project is value for money
C. The person who manages the team's tasks
D. The person who represents the supplier interests
explanation: L'Executive è il 'proprietario' del progetto dal punto di vista del business.

question: Which process is triggered by a project mandate from outside the project?
explanation: Il mandato (Project Mandate) è il trigger esterno che dà il via alle attività di pre-progetto.

question: When is the 'End Stage Report' produced?
explanation: L'End Stage Report riassume le prestazioni dello stage appena concluso e viene preparato in SB.

question: What is the primary purpose of the 'Plans' practice?
options: A. To provide a schedule of all meetings
B. To provide a baseline against which to manage progress and quality
C. To list the contact details of stakeholders
D. To act as a marketing document for the project
explanation: Senza un piano, non c'è controllo, poiché non si può misurare lo scostamento da un obiettivo non definito.

question: In PRINCE2, which statement about sustainability is CORRECT?
options: A. It only refers to environmental impact
B. It is one of the variables of project performance to be managed
C. It is an optional aspect of the project lifecycle
D. It is only managed by the Project Board
explanation: PRINCE2 7 ha introdotto la sostenibilità come settima variabile di performance (insieme a tempi, costi, ecc.).

question: Which of the following is a specific characteristic of a project?
options: A. It maintains the status quo
B. It involves a degree of risk and uncertainty
C. It has no defined end date
D. It is managed by a permanent functional department
explanation: L'incertezza è una caratteristica chiave dei progetti; poiché sono unici, comportano un livello di rischio superiore rispetto alle attività ripetitive (BAU).

question: According to the 'focus on products' principle, what should be defined before a project starts to plan its activities?
options: B. The project's quality requirements and product descriptions
C. The individual team members' salaries
D. The marketing strategy for the product
explanation: Il principio 'Focus on products' stabilisce che i prodotti devono essere definiti chiaramente (tramite Product Descriptions) prima di pianificare le attività necessarie per crearli.

question: Which of the following is a key focus of the 'People' element in PRINCE2 7?
options: A. Creating a rigid hierarchy to prevent any communication
B. Fostering a culture of collaboration and co-creation
C. Ensuring that people work only within their technical silos
D. Minimizing stakeholder engagement to save time
explanation: L'elemento 'People' sottolinea l'importanza della collaborazione e della co-creazione tra il team di progetto e gli stakeholder per garantire il successo.

question: Which management product defines how the project will be delivered in terms of time, cost, and scope?
explanation: Il Project Plan è il documento principale che stabilisce le baseline per tempi, costi, ambito e qualità per l'intero progetto.

question: What is the primary purpose of the 'Risk' practice?
options: A. To eliminate all uncertainty from the project
B. To identify, assess, and control uncertainty and improve the ability to succeed
C. To document the mistakes made in previous projects
D. To assign blame when something goes wrong
explanation: La gestione del rischio non mira a eliminare l'incertezza (impossibile), ma a gestirla in modo proattivo per aumentare le probabilità di successo.

question: Which process is used to provide the Project Board with a choice of whether to continue the project or not?
explanation: Il processo 'Managing a stage boundary' serve a riportare le prestazioni dello stage attuale e pianificare il prossimo, permettendo al Board di decidere se proseguire.

question: Who is responsible for representing the interests of the business and ensuring the project is value for money?
explanation: L'Executive è il responsabile ultimo del progetto e deve garantire che l'investimento sia giustificato dal punto di vista del business.

question: Which is an example of an 'Outcome'?
options: A. A new online sales system
B. Increased sales by 20% after 6 months
C. Customers being able to buy products online
D. A training manual for staff
explanation: L'Outcome (risultato) è il cambiamento derivante dall'uso dei prodotti (output). In questo caso, la capacità di vendere online è il risultato dell'uso del sistema software.

question: When tailoring PRINCE2, which of the following is CORRECT? 1. Principles can be ignored. 2. Practices can be combined. 3. Terminology can be changed. 4. Roles can be shared.
explanation: L'adattamento (Tailoring) permette di modificare processi, terminologia e ruoli, ma i Principi devono essere sempre applicati integralmente.

question: What is 'Emotional Intelligence' in the context of project management?
options: A. The ability to calculate complex financial risks
B. The ability to recognize and manage your own emotions and those of others
C. The speed at which a project manager can write reports
D. The technical proficiency in using project management software
explanation: L'intelligenza emotiva è cruciale per la leadership e la gestione delle relazioni all'interno del team di progetto.

question: Which statement about the 'Business Case' is TRUE?
options: A. It is only needed at the start of the project
B. It is used to justify the project and is updated throughout the lifecycle
C. It is owned by the Project Manager
D. It contains technical specifications for the product
explanation: Il Business Case deve essere 'vivo': viene aggiornato a ogni fine stage per confermare che la giustificazione commerciale sia ancora valida.

question: Which is NOT a type of plan in PRINCE2?
explanation: I piani standard in PRINCE2 sono Project, Stage e Team (più l'Exception Plan). Il 'Resource Register' non è un prodotto di gestione del piano.

question: What is 'Quality Control'?
options: B. The process of inspecting and testing the products
C. Setting the corporate quality policy
D. Writing the quality management approach
explanation: Il controllo qualità riguarda le attività operative (test, ispezioni) per verificare che i prodotti soddisfino i criteri definiti.

question: If a risk is classified as a 'Threat', which response aims to make it impossible for the risk to happen?
explanation: La risposta 'Avoid' (Evitare) cambia il piano o l'ambito per rimuovere completamente la fonte del rischio.

question: What does 'Project Assurance' provide?
options: A. Administrative support to the Project Manager
B. Independent check that the project is being managed correctly
C. The authority to approve budget changes
D. Leadership for the specialist teams
explanation: La Project Assurance assicura al Project Board che il progetto stia seguendo gli standard e le procedure previste, in modo indipendente dal PM.

question: In which process is the 'Lessons Log' first created?
explanation: Il Lessons Log viene creato in 'Starting up a project' per raccogliere le lezioni da progetti precedenti fin dall'inizio.

question: Which process covers the review of a completed 'Work Package'?
explanation: È compito del PM nel processo 'Controlling a stage' verificare il completamento di un Work Package consegnato dal Team Manager.

question: What is an objective of the 'Directing a project' process?
options: A. To manage the day-to-day work of the specialist teams
B. To ensure that corporate management is kept informed about project details
C. To provide the Project Board with a mechanism to exercise overall control
D. To document the technical specifications of the project
explanation: Il Board usa 'Directing a project' per prendere decisioni strategiche senza essere coinvolto nella gestione quotidiana.

question: Which of the following describes 'Sustainability' as a performance variable?
options: A. Ensuring the project team has enough coffee for the duration
B. Managing the project's impact on the environment and society
C. Keeping the project manager in the same role for 10 years
D. Using the same software for every project
explanation: La sostenibilità riguarda l'impatto ambientale, sociale ed economico del progetto e dei suoi prodotti nel tempo.

question: The 'Manage by exception' principle requires that tolerances be set for which of the following? 1. Time. 2. Cost. 3. Risk. 4. Weather.
explanation: Le tolleranze vengono impostate per i sette aspetti della performance (Time, Cost, Quality, Scope, Benefit, Risk, Sustainability). Il meteo non è un aspetto di performance gestito tramite tolleranze fisse.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Organizing' practice?
options: A. To arrange the project files in a folder structure
B. To define the roles and responsibilities in the project team
C. To schedule the technical tasks in a Gantt chart
D. To order the equipment needed for the project
explanation: L'Organizing definisce la struttura di gestione del progetto, chiarendo 'chi fa cosa'.

question: Which is a responsibility of the 'Senior Supplier'?
options: A. Ensuring the project provides value for money
B. Providing the resources needed to deliver the project's products
C. Defining the benefits of the project
D. Managing the project's daily logs
explanation: Il Senior Supplier rappresenta gli interessi di chi fornisce le competenze tecniche e i prodotti, garantendo la fattibilità della soluzione.

question: Which management product tracks the status of all issues?
explanation: L'Issue Register è il registro formale in cui vengono annotati tutti i problemi, le preoccupazioni e le richieste di modifica.

question: A project is overspending. Which tolerance is being breached?
explanation: L'overspending (spesa eccessiva) riguarda direttamente la tolleranza sui costi.

question: In 'Initiating a project', what is the purpose of the 'Quality Management Approach'?
options: A. To test every product personally
B. To define the standards and techniques to be used for quality control
C. To hire the cheapest quality inspector
D. To list the serial numbers of the products
explanation: Questo documento definisce la strategia che il progetto adotterà per garantire che i prodotti siano adatti allo scopo.

question: What is the 'Project Mandate'?
options: A. A legal document signed by a judge
B. The initial document that triggers the 'Starting up a project' process
C. The final report at the end of the project
D. A request for a salary increase for the project team
explanation: Il mandato è l'input fornito dal livello Corporate/Programma che dà l'autorità per iniziare a esaminare l'idea del progetto.

question: Which principle allows the Project Board to delegate authority to the Project Manager while still maintaining control?
explanation: Il Manage by Exception permette la delega tramite l'uso di tolleranze: il PM agisce autonomamente finché non le supera.

question: Which is a factor that influences the 'Project Culture'?
options: A. Only the speed of the internet connection
B. The leadership style and the values shared by the team
C. The brand of laptops used by the team
D. The color of the office walls
explanation: La cultura del progetto è influenzata dai valori, dalla comunicazione e dallo stile di leadership adottato.

question: Which practice aims to ensure that the project is justified throughout its life?
explanation: La pratica del Business Case garantisce che ci sia sempre un motivo valido per spendere soldi e risorse nel progetto.

question: Which management product contains the 'Project Product Description'?
explanation: La Project Product Description (che definisce l'output finale del progetto) viene creata in SU e inserita nel Project Brief.

question: What is 'Change Control'?
options: A. Preventing any changes from happening
B. Ensuring that all changes are assessed and approved before implementation
C. Changing the Project Manager every month
D. Updating the project's bank account details
explanation: Il controllo dei cambiamenti serve a gestire le richieste di modifica in modo ordinato, valutandone l'impatto su tempi, costi e rischi.

question: Which role represents the interests of those who will operate the project's products after the project has finished?
explanation: Il Senior User rappresenta sia chi usa i prodotti per ottenere benefici, sia chi dovrà gestirli operativamente (BAU).

question: What is the purpose of 'Closing a project'?
options: A. To fire the project team as quickly as possible
B. To provide a fixed point at which acceptance for the project product is confirmed
C. To plan the next project
D. To increase the project's budget for the final time
explanation: La chiusura serve a formalizzare la fine del lavoro, assicurarsi che l'utente sia soddisfatto e liberare le risorse.

question: Which activity occurs during 'Managing product delivery'?
options: B. Creating and testing specialist products
explanation: Questo è il processo dove avviene il lavoro 'tecnico' o specialistico per costruire i prodotti del progetto.

question: Which of the following is an 'aspect of project performance'? 1. Cost. 2. Scope. 3. Motivation. 4. Benefits.
explanation: Cost, Scope e Benefits sono tre dei sette aspetti di performance. La motivazione è importante per il 'People' element, ma non è un aspetto di performance misurato con tolleranze.

question: Which principle is being followed when a project team uses lessons from a similar project completed last year?
options: D. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Imparare dall'esperienza significa non ripetere gli errori del passato e riutilizzare ciò che ha funzionato bene.

question: Why is 'Effective Communication' important in the People element?
options: A. To ensure that only the Project Manager knows what is happening
B. To build trust and ensure stakeholders are aligned with project goals
C. To increase the volume of emails sent
D. To hide project risks from the Project Board
explanation: La comunicazione efficace è la base per la gestione degli stakeholder e per mantenere l'impegno verso gli obiettivi del progetto.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Risk Management Approach'?
options: A. To list every single risk in the project
B. To describe how risks will be managed, including the tools and techniques to be used
C. To insure the project against financial loss
D. To decide which risks to ignore
explanation: L'approccio alla gestione dei rischi definisce il 'come' (metodologia) verranno gestiti i rischi durante il progetto.

question: Which role is responsible for the 'Project Diary' (Daily Log)?
explanation: Il PM usa il Daily Log per annotare eventi quotidiani e problemi informali.

question: What is a 'Work Package'?
options: A. A box used to ship the products
B. A set of information about one or more products to be delivered by a team
C. A plan for the entire project lifecycle
D. A list of all stakeholders' phone numbers
explanation: Il Work Package è l'unità di delega tra il PM e il Team Manager, contenente istruzioni su cosa produrre.

question: In risk management, what is 'Probability'?
options: A. The cost of the risk if it happens
B. The likelihood of a risk event occurring
C. The date when the risk will happen
D. The person who identified the risk
explanation: La probabilità esprime quanto è verosimile che un rischio si manifesti.

question: Which process is used to authorize the 'Project Initiation Documentation' (PID)?
explanation: Il Board usa 'Directing a project' per rivedere e approvare la PID, dando il via formale alla fase di consegna.

question: What is the main output of the 'Starting up a project' process?
explanation: Il Project Brief è il risultato fondamentale di SU, usato per decidere se avviare l'iniziazione.

question: What does 'Tailoring' PRINCE2 NOT mean?
options: A. Adapting the method to the complexity of the project
B. Removing principles to make the project faster
C. Changing the names of roles to fit the organization
D. Combining management products to reduce documentation
explanation: Non si può fare tailoring dei principi: se non si applicano tutti i principi, il progetto non è gestito secondo PRINCE2.

question: Which principle is supported by having a 'Stage Plan' for the current stage and a 'Project Plan' for the whole project?
explanation: Pianificare in dettaglio solo lo stage successivo (rolling wave planning) è una parte fondamentale del 'Manage by stages'.

question: What is 'Co-creation'?
options: A. The Project Manager doing all the work alone
B. Working together with stakeholders to achieve a shared outcome
C. Hiring a consultant to do the project
D. Copying a product from a competitor
explanation: La co-creazione implica un coinvolgimento attivo degli stakeholder nella definizione e creazione delle soluzioni.

question: Which statement about the 'Issue Register' is CORRECT?
options: A. It should only be used for technical errors
B. It records all formal issues and their status
C. It is managed by the Senior Supplier
D. It is only updated at the end of the project
explanation: L'Issue Register è uno strumento dinamico aggiornato durante tutto lo stage per tracciare ogni problema o richiesta di modifica.

question: What is the 'Exception Plan' used for?
options: A. To plan the next stage of the project
B. To replace a Stage Plan when a tolerance is breached
C. To list all the risks in the project
D. To document the lessons learned
explanation: Se uno stage esce dalle tolleranze, il PM prepara un Exception Plan per mostrare come recuperare o gestire la nuova situazione.

question: Which is a characteristic of a 'Good' Benefit?
options: A. It is vague and hard to define
B. It is measurable and assigned to an owner
C. It only happens during the project initiation
D. It costs more than the project itself
explanation: I benefici devono essere misurabili (es. aumento del fatturato del 10%) affinché si possa verificare se il progetto ha avuto successo.

question: What does 'Quality Assurance' ensure?
options: A. That the products are high quality
B. That the project is following the organization's quality standards and processes
C. That the project manager is happy
D. That the project has no risks
explanation: La Quality Assurance (spesso a livello corporate) verifica che i processi di gestione della qualità siano seguiti correttamente.

question: Which process involves the 'Checkpointed' reports from the Team Manager?
explanation: Il Team Manager produce 'Checkpoint Reports' durante 'Managing product delivery' per informare il PM sull'avanzamento dei lavori.

question: In 'Controlling a stage', what does the PM do when a Work Package is complete?
options: B. Reviews the quality of the products and marks them as complete
explanation: Il PM deve verificare che i prodotti soddisfino i criteri di qualità prima di accettare il Work Package come finito.

question: What is 'Scope'?
options: A. The cost of the project
B. The total sum of the products and the work required to deliver them
C. The deadline for the project
explanation: L'ambito (Scope) definisce i confini del progetto: cosa verrà consegnato e cosa no.

question: Which principle is being applied when the Project Board approves a Stage Plan?
options: C. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: L'approvazione di ogni stage (e non dell'intero progetto in un colpo solo) garantisce che il Board mantenga il controllo a intervalli regolari.

question: Which role is responsible for establishing a positive working environment?
explanation: Sebbene tutti contribuiscano, il PM ha la responsabilità primaria di gestire il team e creare un clima di collaborazione.

question: What is a 'Risk Appetite'?
options: A. The desire of the team to take more risks
B. The level of risk that an organization is willing to accept
C. The total cost of all risks
D. A meeting where risks are discussed
explanation: La propensione al rischio (Risk Appetite) definisce quanto rischio l'organizzazione è disposta a correre per raggiungere i propri obiettivi.

question: Which management product contains the 'Communication Management Approach'?
explanation: La PID include tutte le strategie/approcci, compreso quello relativo alla comunicazione.

question: When would the 'Closing a project' process be triggered prematurely?
options: A. When the project is finished on time
B. When the Project Board decides the project is no longer justified
C. When the Project Manager goes on holiday
D. When a new team member joins
explanation: Se la giustificazione commerciale viene meno, il Board può ordinare una chiusura anticipata, che segue comunque il processo CP.

question: What is the first step in the 'Managing a stage boundary' process?
explanation: L'attività principale di SB è preparare il piano per lo stage successivo (o un Exception Plan).

question: Which statement about 'Agile' in PRINCE2 is CORRECT?
options: A. PRINCE2 cannot be used with Agile
B. PRINCE2 7 provides guidance on how to use agile ways of working
C. Agile means there is no need for a Project Board
D. Agile removes the need for any documentation
explanation: PRINCE2 7 è progettato per essere flessibile e può integrare perfettamente approcci agili nella consegna dei prodotti.

question: Which principle is being applied when a project is adapted to match its complexity, importance, and capability?
options: B. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Il principio 'Tailor to suit the project' assicura che il metodo PRINCE2 non sia applicato meccanicamente, ma adattato al contesto specifico del progetto.

question: What is the focus of 'Capability' within the People element of PRINCE2 7?
options: A. The financial strength of the supplier
B. The combination of skills, knowledge, and experience of the project team
C. The speed of the project's internet connection
D. The physical capacity of the project office
explanation: La 'Capability' (capacità) si riferisce al mix di competenze e conoscenze che le persone portano nel progetto per garantirne il successo.

question: Which statement about the 'Business Case' practice is CORRECT?
options: A. It is only reviewed during project closure
B. It should be used to justify the project throughout its entire lifecycle
C. It is created after the project plan is finished
D. It is managed by the Team Manager
explanation: La giustificazione commerciale deve essere continua; se il Business Case non è più valido in qualsiasi momento, il progetto dovrebbe essere fermato.

question: Which is a purpose of the 'Organizing' practice?
options: A. To define the sequence of activities for the project
B. To establish a structure to manage the relationships between the project and its stakeholders
C. To list all the equipment needed for the project
D. To document the technical requirements of the products
explanation: La pratica 'Organizing' serve a definire ruoli, responsabilità e come questi interagiscono con gli stakeholder esterni (l'ecosistema del progetto).

question: What is the 'Project Initiation Documentation' (PID) used for?
options: A. To provide a high-level summary for the media
B. To form the basis for the management of the project and its assessment of success
C. To record daily activities of the project team
D. To act as a contract between the supplier and their subcontractors
explanation: La PID è il documento di riferimento che descrive come il progetto verrà gestito, fornendo il punto di baseline per monitorare i progressi.

question: Which of the following is NOT one of the three project interests represented by the Project Board?
explanation: Il Board deve rappresentare Business, Utenti e Fornitori. Gli interessi della concorrenza (Competitor) non fanno parte della struttura di governance di PRINCE2.

question: Who is responsible for specifying the benefits of the project?
explanation: Il Senior User è responsabile della specifica dei benefici attesi, poiché rappresenta coloro che utilizzeranno i prodotti per ottenerli.

question: What is the purpose of a 'Stage Plan'?
options: A. To provide high-level milestones for the whole project
B. To provide the basis for the project manager's day-to-day control of a management stage
C. To document the technical design of a single product
D. To record the lessons learned from previous projects
explanation: Mentre il Project Plan è di alto livello, lo Stage Plan è il dettaglio operativo usato dal PM per gestire lo stage corrente.

question: Which statement about 'Tolerances' is CORRECT?
options: A. They are only set for cost and time
B. They allow management by exception by defining the allowable deviation from plan
C. They are decided by the Team Manager
D. They must be zero in a high-quality project
explanation: Le tolleranze definiscono quanto il PM può scostarsi dal piano (in termini di tempi, costi, ecc.) prima di dover scalare il problema al Board.

question: What is the primary objective of the 'Quality' practice?
options: A. To make every product as expensive as possible
B. To ensure that the project products meet business expectations and are fit for purpose
C. To eliminate the need for any testing
D. To assign blame when a product fails
explanation: La qualità in PRINCE2 riguarda la garanzia che i prodotti soddisfino i requisiti e i criteri di accettazione definiti dall'utente.

question: A 'Threat' is a risk that has what kind of impact on project objectives?
explanation: In PRINCE2, una minaccia (Threat) è un evento incerto che avrebbe un impatto negativo sugli obiettivi se si verificasse.

question: Which risk response involves sharing the pain or gain of a risk with a third party?
explanation: La risposta 'Share' viene solitamente applicata tramite contratti in cui fornitore e cliente condividono i rischi e i benefici.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Issue Register'?
options: A. To store all project risks
B. To capture and maintain information on all of the formal issues
C. To list the contact details of the project team
D. To record the results of quality tests
explanation: L'Issue Register tiene traccia di tutte le richieste di modifica, fuori specifica e problemi generali che vengono formalizzati.

question: What is an 'Off-specification'?
options: A. A product that is delivered ahead of schedule
B. Something that should be provided by the project, but is currently not (or is forecast not to be)
C. A change requested by the Project Board
D. A risk that has a high probability
explanation: Una 'fuori specifica' (Off-specification) si verifica quando un prodotto non soddisfa i requisiti definiti o mancherà di alcune caratteristiche.

question: Which practice provides the control mechanism for the Project Board to monitor the project's viability?
explanation: La pratica 'Progress' assicura che il Board riceva le informazioni necessarie (report e stage boundary) per confermare che il progetto valga ancora la pena.

question: Which process is triggered by a request from the Project Board to start the initiation stage?
explanation: Dopo che SU è terminato, il Board autorizza l'inizio dell'iniziazione, che avviene tramite il processo 'Initiating a project'.

question: What is an objective of the 'Starting up a project' process?
options: A. To create the Project Initiation Documentation
B. To ensure that the prerequisites for initiating the project are in place
C. To deliver the project's specialist products
D. To perform the final audit of the project
explanation: SU è un filtro per evitare che organizzazioni inizino progetti mal definiti. Assicura che ci sia una giustificazione e un approccio chiaro.

question: Who is responsible for creating the 'Exception Plan'?
explanation: Quando viene prevista una violazione delle tolleranze, il PM deve preparare un Exception Plan per sottoporlo all'approvazione del Board.

question: In which process are 'Work Packages' authorized and received?
explanation: In 'Controlling a stage', il PM autorizza il lavoro; il Team Manager lo riceve invece nel processo 'Managing product delivery'.

question: Which activity is part of 'Closing a project'?
options: B. Preparing the end project report
C. Authorizing a request for change
explanation: L'End Project Report riassume le prestazioni complessive del progetto e viene preparato durante la chiusura.

question: Which of the following is an example of a 'Dis-benefit'?
options: A. A risk that the project will fail
B. An outcome perceived as negative by one or more stakeholders
C. The total cost of the project
D. A delay in the project schedule
explanation: Un 'Dis-benefit' (svantaggio) è una conseguenza negativa prevista dell'investimento (es. riduzione della produttività durante l'installazione di un nuovo software).

question: Which principle emphasizes that a project should only continue as long as it remains desirable, viable, and achievable?
explanation: Questo principio richiede che la giustificazione (desiderabilità, fattibilità) sia presente dall'inizio alla fine.

question: How does PRINCE2 7 define 'Co-creation'?
options: A. Two project managers working on the same project
B. Working together to create value through collaboration with stakeholders
C. Automating the creation of management products
D. Copying a project plan from another company
explanation: La co-creazione riguarda il coinvolgimento attivo degli stakeholder nella definizione e creazione delle soluzioni.

question: Which document is used to record any quality problems identified during a quality review?
explanation: Se durante una revisione della qualità emerge un problema che richiede una gestione formale, questo viene registrato come Issue.

question: What does the 'Business Case' practice help to avoid?
options: B. Poorly conceived projects that do not deliver value
C. Having to talk to stakeholders
D. Using software to manage the project
explanation: Il Business Case assicura che le risorse dell'organizzazione non vengano sprecate in progetti che non hanno un ritorno economico o strategico.

question: Identify the missing word: The project [?] should be kept as small as possible to encourage effective decision-making.
explanation: Il Project Board deve essere snello; troppi membri renderebbero difficile prendere decisioni rapide e unanimi.

question: Which of the following is a responsibility of the 'Project Manager'?
options: A. To provide the project budget
B. To manage the project on a day-to-day basis within the constraints set by the Board
C. To perform project assurance for the Executive
D. To decide on the project's strategic direction
explanation: Il PM gestisce il quotidiano, ma opera sempre all'interno dei limiti (tolleranze) stabiliti dal Board.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Quality Management Approach'?
options: A. To describe how quality will be managed on the project
B. To list all the products and their quality criteria
C. To record the results of quality inspections
D. To act as a certificate of completion
explanation: L'approccio alla gestione della qualità definisce le procedure, i ruoli e gli standard che verranno seguiti durante il progetto.

question: Which role defines the 'Quality Criteria' for a specialist product?
explanation: È l'utente (Senior User) a dover dire quali caratteristiche deve avere il prodotto per essere considerato accettabile.

question: In risk management, what is 'Inherent Risk'?
options: A. The risk remaining after a response has been implemented
B. The exposure to a risk before any action is taken to manage it
C. A risk that is inherited from a previous project
D. A risk that is only related to the budget
explanation: Il rischio inerente è il livello di rischio 'puro', così come si presenta prima che vengano applicate misure di mitigazione.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Risk Register'?
options: A. To list the names of all stakeholders
B. To record information about all identified risks and their status
C. To document the technical specs of the project
D. To archive the final project budget
explanation: Il Risk Register è lo strumento centrale per monitorare l'evoluzione dei rischi e l'efficacia delle risposte pianificate.

question: Who has the authority to approve a 'Request for Change'?
options: B. The Change Authority (which could be the Project Board)
explanation: L'autorità di cambiamento (Change Authority) viene definita all'inizio e ha il compito di valutare e approvare le modifiche.

question: What is 'Scope Creep'?
options: A. A risk that the project will be finished early
B. The uncontrolled expansion of the project scope without adjustments to time and cost
C. The process of reducing project costs
D. A meeting to discuss project products
explanation: Lo 'Scope Creep' si verifica quando si aggiungono requisiti senza seguire il processo formale di controllo dei cambiamenti.

question: What is the 'Daily Log' used for?
options: A. To record formal issues that need the Board's attention
B. To record informal issues, notes and daily activities by the Project Manager
C. To track the budget spending
D. To document the minutes of the Project Board meetings
explanation: Il Daily Log è un diario informale del PM per catturare dettagli che non richiedono (ancora) una gestione formale.

question: Which document reports the project status at the end of a management stage?
explanation: L'End Stage Report fornisce al Board i risultati dello stage concluso per decidere se autorizzare il prossimo.

question: In which process is the 'Benefits Management Approach' first drafted?
explanation: Durante l'iniziazione (IP) viene definito come e quando i benefici verranno misurati.

question: Which process is used by the Project Board to respond to an 'Exception Report'?
explanation: Il Board gestisce le eccezioni attraverso 'Directing a project', dando indicazioni al PM su come procedere.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Managing product delivery' process?
options: A. To authorize the start of a stage
B. To control the link between the Project Manager and the Team Manager(s)
C. To prepare the project for closure
D. To update the Business Case
explanation: Questo processo gestisce la relazione tra chi gestisce il progetto (PM) e chi crea fisicamente i prodotti (Team Manager).

question: Which activity is part of 'Managing a stage boundary'?
options: B. Updating the project plan with actuals to date
D. Taking corrective action to stay within stage tolerances
explanation: In SB, il PM aggiorna il piano di progetto complessivo per riflettere quanto accaduto finora e rivedere le previsioni.

question: What is a 'Lessons Report'?
options: A. A list of things the project manager did wrong
B. A document used to pass on experience that can be applied to other projects
C. A technical manual for the project's users
D. A report on the team's behavior during a workshop
explanation: Il Lessons Report serve a diffondere la conoscenza acquisita durante il progetto affinché l'organizzazione possa migliorare in futuro.

question: Which of the following describes 'Output'?
options: A. The reason for the project
B. Any of the project's specialist products
C. The results of the change
D. The money earned from the project
explanation: L'output è il 'cosa' viene prodotto dal progetto (es. un ponte, un sito web).

question: Which principle is being ignored if the Project Board is involved in the day-to-day management of the project?
explanation: Il 'Manage by exception' serve proprio a evitare che il Board sprechi tempo nel quotidiano, delegando al PM tramite le tolleranze.

question: In PRINCE2 7, why is 'Culture' important in a project?
options: A. It determines the software tools to be used
B. It influences how people interact and respond to change
C. It defines the project's budget limits
D. It is used to choose the project's brand name
explanation: La cultura del progetto (valori, attitudini) influenza pesantemente l'efficacia della comunicazione e la gestione dei conflitti.

question: What should be included in a 'Product Description'? 1. Quality criteria. 2. Project budget. 3. Quality methods. 4. Derivation.
explanation: Una descrizione di prodotto contiene criteri di qualità, metodi e da dove il prodotto deriva. Il budget del progetto è invece parte del Piano.

question: Which management product defines the frequency of communications between the Project Manager and the Project Board?
explanation: Questo documento specifica chi, come e quando deve ricevere informazioni.

question: What is 'Residual Risk'?
options: A. The risk that was forgotten
B. The risk remaining after risk responses have been applied
C. The total risk of the whole company
D. A risk that has already happened
explanation: Anche dopo aver messo in atto azioni di mitigazione, può rimanere una parte di rischio: questo è il rischio residuo.

question: Which practice ensures that any proposed changes to the project scope are properly assessed?
explanation: La gestione delle Issue (che include le richieste di modifica) garantisce che i cambiamenti non siano implementati senza valutare l'impatto.

question: What is an objective of the 'Controlling a stage' process?
options: B. To assign and monitor the work being done
C. To plan the next stage in detail
D. To confirm that the project product has been accepted
explanation: Questo è il cuore del lavoro del PM durante uno stage: assegnare task, monitorare e reagire ai problemi.

question: In which process does the Project Manager verify that all project products have been approved?
explanation: Nella chiusura si verifica che tutto ciò che era previsto nella PID sia stato consegnato e approvato.

question: Identify the missing word: The process 'Directing a project' enables the Project Board to be [?] for the project's success.
explanation: Il Board è 'Accountable' (responsabile ultimo) del successo o fallimento del progetto, mentre il PM è 'Responsible' per la gestione.

question: Which aspect of project performance relates to how 'Green' or 'Ethical' the project is?
explanation: La sostenibilità (Sustainability) monitora l'impatto ambientale e sociale del progetto.

question: Using 'Management Stages' helps the Project Board by providing what?
options: A. A chance to work on the technical products
B. Review and decision points at regular intervals
C. A way to avoid talking to the Project Manager
D. The authority to ignore the Business Case
explanation: Dividere il progetto in stage dà al Board il controllo necessario per decidere se continuare o meno senza dover monitorare ogni giorno.

question: What is the role of 'Leadership' in a project team?
options: A. To give orders without explanation
B. To motivate and inspire people to work towards project goals
C. To perform all quality tests personally
D. To report all team members' mistakes to HR
explanation: La leadership riguarda l'orientamento delle persone e la creazione di un ambiente che favorisca il successo.

question: Who defines the 'Acceptance Criteria' for the project?
explanation: I criteri di accettazione sono stabiliti all'inizio dal Business (Executive) e dagli Utenti per definire cosa renderà il progetto un successo.

question: Which plan is created during the 'Starting up a project' process?
explanation: In SU, il PM pianifica solo lo stage di iniziazione; il Project Plan completo verrà creato solo in IP.

question: What is a 'Risk Owner'?
options: A. The person who identified the risk
B. The person responsible for managing and monitoring a specific risk
C. The person who pays for the risk if it happens
D. The Project Board member who likes taking risks
explanation: Ogni rischio deve avere un proprietario che sia responsabile di tenerlo sotto controllo.

question: Which report is sent by the Project Manager to the Board to report a breach of tolerance?
explanation: L'Exception Report è il segnale di allarme formale quando il PM non può più garantire il rispetto dei limiti di stage.

question: In which process does the Project Manager prepare the 'Stage Plan' for the next stage?
explanation: La pianificazione dello stage successivo avviene verso la fine dello stage corrente, nel processo SB.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Progress' practice?
options: A. To speed up the project
B. To monitor and control the project's performance against its plans
C. To ensure the team is working overtime
D. To document the technical specs of the products
explanation: La pratica del progresso fornisce le baseline e i meccanismi per capire dove siamo rispetto a dove dovremmo essere.

question: Which PRINCE2 element describes the environment in which the project team works and communicates?
explanation: L'elemento 'People' è stato introdotto in PRINCE2 7 proprio per coprire l'aspetto umano, la cultura e la comunicazione nel progetto.

question: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of a project?
explanation: I progetti sono caratterizzati da incertezza (Uncertainty) a causa della loro unicità. La 'High certainty' è tipica del Business as Usual.

question: Which principle is being applied when the Project Board sets limits on how much money the Project Manager can spend before needing further approval?
explanation: Il principio 'Manage by exception' utilizza le tolleranze (limiti) per delegare l'autorità mantenendo il controllo.

question: Identify the missing words: A [?] is the measurable improvement resulting from an [?] which is perceived as an advantage by one or more stakeholders.
explanation: La definizione corretta è: un Beneficio è il miglioramento misurabile derivante da un Risultato (Outcome).

question: Which of the following are aspects of the 'People' element in PRINCE2 7? 1. Leadership. 2. Management stages. 3. Culture. 4. Collaboration.
explanation: Leadership, Cultura e Collaborazione sono pilastri dell'elemento People. 'Management stages' appartiene invece alla struttura del metodo (Processi/Principi).

question: Which statement about the 'Business Case' practice is CORRECT?
options: A. It is created once and never changed
B. It is used to record the technical progress of the team
C. It is reviewed at every stage boundary to ensure continued justification
D. It is only necessary if the project is over budget
explanation: Il Business Case deve essere validato durante tutto il progetto, specialmente alla fine di ogni stage (SB).

question: Which role is responsible for ensuring that the project's products meet the quality requirements of the users?
explanation: Il Senior User rappresenta chi userà i prodotti e deve quindi garantire che siano idonei allo scopo e soddisfino i requisiti di qualità.

question: What is the primary purpose of the 'Plans' practice?
options: A. To provide a schedule for the project team to follow
B. To ensure that everyone is working as many hours as possible
0. To provide the baseline against which progress and performance can be measured
D. To document all the risks in the project
explanation: I piani servono come 'baseline' per il controllo. Senza un piano non si può misurare l'andamento reale.

question: Which of the following is NOT a step in the risk management procedure?
explanation: La procedura standard è: Identify, Assess, Plan, Implement, Communicate. 'Execute' non è un termine tecnico della procedura.

question: What does a 'Request for Change' (RFC) describe?
options: A. A new risk that has been discovered
B. A proposal to modify a product that is already under baseline control
C. A request for more budget without changing the scope
D. A report on the team's performance
explanation: L'RFC viene usato quando si vuole modificare qualcosa che è già stato approvato (baseline).

question: Which document is used to track the progress of a management stage?
explanation: L'Highlight Report è lo strumento con cui il PM aggiorna il Board sull'andamento dello stage.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Directing a project' process?
options: A. To manage the day-to-day work of the specialists
B. To provide the Project Board with a way to exercise overall control without being involved in the detail
C. To plan the project initiation stage
D. To authorize every single email sent by the team
explanation: Questo processo permette al Board di prendere decisioni chiave (autorizzazioni) senza dover gestire operativamente il progetto.

question: In which process is the 'Project Brief' produced?
explanation: Il Project Brief viene creato in SU per fornire le informazioni necessarie a decidere se avviare l'iniziazione.

question: What is an objective of the 'Managing product delivery' process?
options: A. To authorize work packages to be started
B. To ensure that products are created and delivered to the project manager's expectations
C. To update the stage plan with actual progress
D. To approve the project budget
explanation: Questo processo è focalizzato sul Team Manager e sulla creazione fisica dei prodotti richiesti.

question: Which activity is part of 'Managing a stage boundary'?
options: A. Handing over products to the users
B. Preparing an Exception Plan if the stage is forecast to exceed tolerances
C. Giving the team manager a work package
explanation: Se si prevede che le tolleranze vengano superate, in SB si prepara l'Exception Plan per il Board.

question: Which aspect of performance ensures that the project does not negatively impact future generations?
explanation: La sostenibilità riguarda l'impatto a lungo termine, ambientale e sociale, delle attività di progetto.

question: Which principle states that a PRINCE2 project must have at least two management stages?
options: D. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Il requisito minimo per un progetto PRINCE2 è avere due stage: Iniziazione e almeno uno Stage di Consegna.

question: What is the importance of 'Psychological Safety' in a project team?
options: A. It ensures no one ever makes a mistake
B. It allows team members to speak up and share concerns without fear of negative consequences
C. It prevents stakeholders from changing the scope
D. It is used to justify a higher salary for the project manager
explanation: La sicurezza psicologica favorisce l'apprendimento, la trasparenza e la gestione proattiva dei rischi.

question: Which of the following are types of 'Issue' in PRINCE2? 1. Request for Change. 2. Off-specification. 3. External threat. 4. Problem/Concern.
explanation: Le minacce esterne sono 'Rischi'. Le Issue sono classificate come RFC, Off-spec e Problemi/Preoccupazioni.

question: What does 'Project Assurance' check?
options: A. That the team is working fast enough
B. That the project is being managed according to the agreed standards and PID
C. That the project manager is being paid correctly
D. That the users like the project manager
explanation: La Project Assurance fornisce una garanzia indipendente al Board sulla correttezza della gestione.

question: Which plan is the most detailed?
explanation: Il Team Plan è quello più granulare, poiché scende al livello delle attività individuali dei membri del team specialistico.

question: In 'Controlling a stage', what is the purpose of the 'Issue Report'?
options: A. To inform the Board about every minor mistake
B. To provide detailed information about a specific formal issue
C. To list all the lessons learned in the stage
D. To update the project budget
explanation: L'Issue Report viene creato quando un'issue richiede un'analisi dettagliata e una decisione formale.

question: What is the final activity of the 'Closing a project' process?
options: B. Recommend project closure to the Project Board
explanation: Il processo CP non chiude il progetto, ma 'raccomanda' la chiusura. La decisione finale spetta al Board in DP.

question: Which of the following is a role within the 'Project Ecosystem'?
explanation: L'ecosistema del progetto include tutte le parti interessate interne ed esterne, compresi fornitori, regolatori e concorrenti.

question: What is the benefit of the 'Learn from experience' principle?
options: A. It makes the project take longer
B. It prevents the organization from repeating the same mistakes
C. It allows the project manager to blame others
D. It ensures that the project uses the newest technology
explanation: Imparare dall'esperienza è fondamentale per il miglioramento continuo e l'efficienza organizzativa.

question: Who is responsible for fostering collaboration between different project teams?
explanation: Il PM ha il compito di coordinare i vari team e assicurarsi che collaborino efficacemente verso l'obiettivo comune.

question: Which document defines the 'Communication Management Approach'?
explanation: Questo approccio fa parte della PID e stabilisce come avverrà lo scambio di informazioni.

question: What is 'MoSCoW' used for in PRINCE2?
options: A. To calculate the project budget
B. To prioritize requirements or products
explanation: MoSCoW (Must, Should, Could, Won't) è una tecnica di prioritizzazione usata specialmente per gestire l'ambito (Scope).

question: In risk management, what does 'Impact' mean?
options: A. The likelihood of the risk happening
B. The effect the risk event would have on project objectives
C. The time it takes to resolve the risk
D. The cost of identifying the risk
explanation: L'impatto descrive la gravità delle conseguenze di un rischio se questo si trasformasse in un problema.

question: Which of the following is a duty of 'Project Support'?
options: B. Maintaining the project registers and logs
explanation: Il Project Support fornisce assistenza amministrativa e tecnica, come la manutenzione dei registri.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Quality Register'?
options: A. To list the salaries of the quality inspectors
B. To summarize all the quality activities that are planned or have taken place
C. To record all the technical errors in the code
D. To act as a user manual
explanation: Il registro della qualità serve a monitorare l'esecuzione dei test e delle approvazioni dei prodotti.

question: Which process ensures that the project mandate is clearly understood?
explanation: In SU, il PM e l'Executive analizzano il mandato per chiarire cosa l'organizzazione vuole ottenere.

question: What is an output of 'Initiating a project'?
explanation: La PID è l'output principale dell'iniziazione, contenente tutti i piani e le strategie.

question: Which process is used to handle a request for change?
explanation: In 'Controlling a stage', il PM riceve, analizza e decide (o scala) le richieste di modifica.

question: When is the 'Lessons Log' updated?
options: A. Only at the end of the project
C. Throughout the project, as lessons are identified
D. Never, it is a read-only document
explanation: Le lezioni devono essere catturate nel momento in cui vengono scoperte per non perderne i dettagli.

question: Which of the following are performance variables in PRINCE2? 1. Time. 2. Quality. 3. Motivation. 4. Scope.
explanation: Motivation non è una delle 7 variabili di performance ufficiali (Time, Cost, Quality, Scope, Benefits, Risk, Sustainability).

question: Which principle is being applied when a project manager combines two processes because the project is very small?
options: B. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: L'adattamento (Tailoring) permette di snellire i processi per progetti a bassa complessità.

question: What is the 'Accountability' of the Project Board?
options: A. To do the work of the team manager
B. To be ultimately responsible for the success or failure of the project
C. To write the project's code
D. To manage the project daily
explanation: Mentre il PM è responsabile della gestione, il Board risponde dell'investimento complessivo (Accountability).

question: Which practice defines how the project will manage threats and opportunities?
explanation: La pratica del Rischio si occupa sia degli eventi negativi (minacce) che di quelli positivi (opportunità).

question: What is a 'Product Description' NOT used for?
options: A. To define the purpose of the product
B. To define the salary of the person making the product
C. To define the quality criteria
D. To define the derivation of the product
explanation: Le descrizioni dei prodotti si focalizzano sulle caratteristiche del prodotto, non su dettagli amministrativi come i salari.

question: Who is responsible for the 'Benefits Management Approach'?
explanation: L'Executive è il proprietario del Business Case e quindi del piano per realizzare i benefici.

question: Which process is used to prepare for the end of the project?
explanation: CP (Closing a project) serve a finalizzare tutte le attività e preparare il progetto per lo smantellamento.

question: What happens in 'Directing a project' at the end of each stage?
options: A. The Board writes the end stage report
B. The Board reviews the end stage report and decides whether to authorize the next stage
C. The Board takes over the project management
D. The Board cancels the project automatically
explanation: È il momento della decisione 'Go/No-Go' basata sulle informazioni fornite dal PM.

question: What does 'Cross-functional' mean in a project team?
options: A. All team members have the same job
B. The team is composed of people with different skills from different departments
C. The team only works on one function at a time
D. The team has no manager
explanation: I progetti uniscono competenze diverse (marketing, IT, finance, ecc.) per raggiungere un obiettivo comune.

question: Which principle is supported by the use of 'Product Descriptions'?
explanation: Le Product Descriptions sono lo strumento principale per implementare il principio 'Focus on products'.

question: Identify the missing word: The Project [?] is a temporary structure created to deliver the project's outputs.
explanation: Il Project Team è l'organizzazione temporanea definita da PRINCE2.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Progress' practice? 1. To monitor actuals against plan. 2. To update the business case. 3. To take corrective action. 4. To hire new staff.
explanation: Monitorare, aggiornare la giustificazione e agire sono attività di controllo del progresso. L'assunzione di staff è un'attività amministrativa/HR.

question: A project is running late. Which tolerance is at risk?
explanation: Il ritardo (Running late) impatta direttamente sulla tolleranza temporale.

question: Who defines the 'Project Product Description'?
explanation: Sebbene il PM la scriva materialmente, è il Senior User che deve fornire i requisiti e i criteri di accettazione finali.

question: Which process is used to plan the initiation stage?
explanation: In SU, il PM prepara lo Stage Plan per lo stage di iniziazione.

question: What does the Project Manager do in 'Managing a stage boundary'?
options: B. Reviews the performance of the current stage and plans the next one
D. Performs quality tests on specialist products
explanation: SB è un punto di transizione: si guarda indietro per rendicontare e avanti per pianificare.

question: Which of the following is a 'Benefit'?
options: B. 15% reduction in customer service response time
explanation: La riduzione dei tempi è un miglioramento misurabile (Beneficio), mentre il software è l'Output.

question: Which principle is being ignored if a project manager does not record the problems encountered in a previous project?
explanation: Non registrare o non consultare le lezioni apprese viola il principio 'Learn from experience'.

question: What is the purpose of 'Collaboration' in PRINCE2 7?
options: A. To make sure everyone agrees with the Project Manager
B. To leverage the collective intelligence of the team to solve problems
C. To reduce the number of team members
D. To avoid having to write reports
explanation: La collaborazione permette di ottenere risultati migliori unendo le diverse competenze del team.

question: Which of the following is a 'Work Package' NOT intended to do?
options: A. Define the products to be created
B. Provide the authority to start work
C. Define the personal career goals of the team members
D. Define the reporting requirements for the team manager
explanation: Il Work Package è uno strumento di gestione del lavoro, non di gestione delle carriere individuali.

question: Identify the missing word: A [?] is a situation where it is forecast that there will be a deviation beyond agreed tolerance levels.
explanation: L'Eccezione (Exception) si riferisce specificamente al superamento delle tolleranze.

question: Who is responsible for 'Project Assurance' for the Supplier interest?
explanation: Ogni membro del Board è responsabile dell'assicurazione per la propria area di interesse.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Checkpoint Report'?
options: A. To update the Board on project progress
B. To update the Project Manager on the progress of a work package
C. To record the results of a quality review
D. To authorize a stage plan
explanation: Il Checkpoint Report è inviato dal Team Manager al PM con cadenza regolare (es. settimanale).

question: Which process covers the review of the Project Brief and the decision to proceed to initiation?
explanation: In 'Directing a project', il Board prende la decisione di autorizzare o meno l'iniziazione.

question: Which of the following is an 'Opportunity'?
options: A. A new regulation that might stop the project
B. A potential discount on materials if we buy them earlier than planned
C. A team member leaving the project
explanation: Uno sconto imprevisto è un rischio con impatto positivo, quindi un'Opportunità.

question: PRINCE2 is based on which of the following? 1. Principles. 2. Practices. 3. People. 4. Processes.
explanation: PRINCE2 7 è composto da quattro elementi integrati: Principi, Pratiche, Processi e l'elemento People (novità della versione 7).

question: Which of the following are the 'seven aspects of project performance'? 1. Cost and Time. 2. Quality and Scope. 3. Benefits and Risk. 4. Sustainability.
explanation: PRINCE2 7 gestisce sette aspetti di performance: Costo, Tempo, Qualità, Ambito, Benefici, Rischio e la nuova aggiunta Sostenibilità.

question: Which principle states that the project management team should understand the context and adjust the method accordingly?
options: C. Tailor to suit the project
explanation: Il principio 'Tailor to suit the project' assicura che PRINCE2 sia adattato alla scala, complessità e importanza del progetto.

question: What is the primary focus of the 'Ecosystem' concept in the people element?
options: A. The environmental impact of the project products
B. The relationships between the project and the internal/external organizational context
C. The software infrastructure used by the team
D. The biological diversity in the office
explanation: L'ecosistema riguarda il modo in care il progetto interagisce con la casa madre, i fornitori e gli altri stakeholder esterni.

question: Which of the following is NOT a purpose of the 'Business Case' practice?
options: A. To provide a justification for the project
B. To define the technical design of the specialist products
C. To enable the Project Board to decide if the project is worth the investment
D. To monitor if the project remains viable
explanation: Il Business Case si occupa della giustificazione economica e strategica, non del design tecnico dei prodotti specialistici.

question: Identify the missing word: The project [?] provides the authority for the Project Manager to manage a stage.
explanation: Il Project Board è l'organo che delega l'autorità al PM tramite l'approvazione dei piani di stage.

question: In the 'Organizing' practice, which role is accountable for the project's success from a business perspective?
explanation: L'Executive è il responsabile ultimo (accountable) della giustificazione commerciale e del successo del progetto.

question: What is the purpose of the 'Quality Management Approach'?
options: A. To list the quality criteria for every product
B. To define the standards and techniques to be used to ensure quality
C. To record the results of quality audits
D. To act as a contract for the suppliers
explanation: Questo documento definisce la strategia complessiva per gestire la qualità, inclusi processi e responsabilità.

question: Which statement about 'Risk' is CORRECT?
options: A. It is an event that has already happened
B. It only refers to events that can hurt the project
C. It is an uncertain event that can have a positive or negative effect on objectives
D. It is managed only by the Project Board
explanation: In PRINCE2, il rischio è incertezza e comprende sia minacce (negative) che opportunità (positive).

question: Which process ensures that there is a shared understanding of why the project is needed?
explanation: Il processo SU serve a confermare che ci sia un Business Case 'outline' e una motivazione valida per procedere.

question: Who is responsible for authorizing the 'Project Initiation Documentation' (PID)?
explanation: Solo il Project Board ha l'autorità di approvare la PID e dare il via formale alla fase di consegna.

question: What is an 'Outcome'?
options: A. A physical product delivered by the team
B. The result of the change derived from using the project's outputs
C. The money saved by the project
D. A risk that didn't happen
explanation: L'Outcome è il cambiamento nel comportamento o nelle operazioni che deriva dall'utilizzo degli output (prodotti) del progetto.

question: Which principle is being applied when a project manager checks a 'Lessons Log' before planning a new stage?
explanation: Cercare e applicare le lezioni apprese è il cuore del principio 'Learn from experience'.

question: Which characteristic is essential for 'Collaboration' in a PRINCE2 7 team?
options: A. People working in isolation to avoid conflicts
B. Shared goals and mutual trust among team members
C. Only the Project Manager making decisions
D. Communicating only through formal reports
